Motion And Notice Of Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Financial Condition Of Defendant John Armor As An Individual And Trustee Of The Armor Family Trust
Off Calendar Mar-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Attorney, Aaron Darsky, Specially appearing for Plaintiff Paul Bontekoe the moving party. / Attorney Elisa Marcaletti for Defendant John Armor the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of PLAINTIFFS PAUL BONTEKOE, JEFFREY SPAHN's Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Financial Condition Of Defendant John Armor As An Individual And Trustee Of The Armor Family Trust is DENIED without predjudice. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Mtn For Relief From Inadvertent Dismissal
Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on TUE-AUG-26-2014:
Josephine L. Alioto, Esq. of Law Offices of Eric L. Lifschitz (415.553.6055) appearing for Plaintiffs; No other appearances.

RULING - The Court adopts the following tentative ruling: PLAINTIFFS PAUL BONTEKOE and JEFFREY SPAHN'S Motion For Relief From Inadvertent Dismissal is GRANTED in part. Voluntary dismissal is set aside. Request to reinstate/re-set trial date shall be made in Department 206. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (D501)
